name: Qin Shi Huang
description:
👑• Silly emergency.

| Qin Shi Huang doesn't know where he left his blindfold. |

No one said that dealing with an Emperor would be easy. But if it's him, things inevitably get twice as complicated.

Notes:

This bot caused me more problems than it should have. q-q

I ended up opting for something silly because that's what my past self wanted. Yeey!
